name: Credit Card Mgmt Svcs, Inc D/B/A Debthelper.Com
description_short: Non-profit credit counseling organization offering debt management plans, housing counseling, and financial education with certified personal finance counselors.
description_long:
DebtHelper.com is a non-profit organization providing credit and debt solutions through certified personal finance counselors. The organization operates under the name Credit Card Mgmt Svcs, Inc D/B/A Debthelper.Com and focuses on helping consumers avoid bankruptcy through structured financial guidance. Their primary service is creating customized debt management plans that work directly with creditors to reduce borrower obligations.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of services including credit card consolidation, debt management plans, housing counseling for first-time homebuyers, reverse mortgage counseling for seniors 62+, foreclosure assistance, bankruptcy education courses, budget analysis, credit analysis, payday loan debt assistance, student loan guidance, and personal finance education seminars. All initial counseling consultations are offered free and confidentially. They provide both individual counseling and on-site group seminars for community organizations and businesses in the South Florida area.

DebtHelper distinguishes itself through its non-profit status and HUD-approved/NFCC-certified counselor credentials. The organization emphasizes client success stories showing concrete results: average credit card payments reduced from $1,516 to $371 monthly, interest rates dropped from 24.99% to 0%, and debts repaid in half the standard time. Their debt management plans include creditor benefits such as lower monthly payments, reduced interest rates, suspension of late fees, account re-aging, and discontinuation of collection calls.

As a legitimate non-profit counseling service, DebtHelper is appropriate for consumers seeking debt consolidation without predatory lending terms. However, the website lacks detailed transparency about success rates, typical program costs (if any), timelines to debt payoff, credit score impacts, or detailed program terms and conditions. The asterisk (*) on the 0% interest claim suggests conditions or limitations not explained on the public-facing website.
pros: Non-profit organization with certified personal finance counselors, reducing predatory lending concerns
Free initial counseling consultations and budget analysis for all consumers
Documented results showing average monthly payments reduced from $1,516 to $371
Direct creditor negotiation for lower interest rates, reduced fees, and account re-aging
Comprehensive services beyond debt management: housing counseling, bankruptcy education, foreclosure assistance, student loan guidance
HUD-approved housing counseling and apparent NFCC-certified credentials
Toll-free hotline (800-920-2262) and online portal access for clients
cons: Website lacks transparency on program costs, whether fees apply after initial counseling, or hidden conditions
0% interest rate claim includes unexplained asterisk (*) suggesting undisclosed limitations or conditions
No published success rates, average debt payoff timelines, or detailed program terms and conditions available
Limited information on credit score impact during the debt management plan process
Services appear geographically limited with emphasis on South Florida area for on-site seminars and foreclosure assistance
best_for: Consumers with multiple credit card debts seeking consolidation without predatory terms
Individuals behind on payments or struggling with minimum-only monthly payments seeking a structured repayment plan
First-time homebuyers or seniors 62+ seeking housing counseling and mortgage education
People at risk of bankruptcy looking for legitimate non-profit credit counseling alternatives
diagnosis: DebtHelper is best for consumers with existing credit card debt who want legitimate non-profit credit counseling and creditor-negotiated payment plans without predatory lending. The main caveat is that the website provides insufficient transparency about program costs, actual credit score impacts, realistic payoff timelines, and the specific conditions attached to promotional claims like 0% interest rates—prospective clients must contact counselors directly to understand the full terms.
services: Debt Management Plans with direct creditor negotiation
Credit Card Consolidation and interest rate reduction
Budget Analysis and personal financial counseling
Credit Analysis and credit education courses
Housing Counseling and First-Time Homebuyer Education
Bankruptcy Counseling and Bankruptcy Education Courses
Back-to-Work Counseling and Financial Education Seminars
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
address: 400 W Cummings Park, Ste 4250, Woburn, MA 01801
